title: Football Typographic Perspective Poster AI
sourceTitle: Football Typographic Perspective Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Platform Goal: Create one image asset for both Pinterest and X. It must work as a Pinterest Pin cover and as an X image-hook post that can anchor a prompt thread. Hero Subject: fictional world football star with number 10 in green-gold national color kit. Scene / Context: stadium tunnel with giant perspective word SPEED forming the visual skeleton. Source Recipe Translation: football typographic perspective poster. Preserve these source mechanics: premium global sports campaign poster, realistic player photography, giant perspective typography, kinetic layout. Concrete social variant uses fictional world football star with number 10 in green-gold national color kit in stadium tunnel with giant perspective word SPEED forming the visual skeleton. Composition: vertical 4:5 or 2:3 social-poster composition with a strong central focal subject and clean negative space; Pinterest-first vertical 4:5 or 2:3 unless the source layout requires otherwise; keep the main subject readable in a small thumbnail and center-safe for X crop previews. Style System: premium global sports campaign poster, realistic player photography, giant perspective typography, kinetic layout; polished editorial finish, strong first-glance contrast, clean hierarchy, no raw prompt text shown in the image. Visible Text: SPEED / Break the line; English-only readable text if text is part of the design; otherwise no visible text. Social Safety and Publishing Constraints: fictionalized social-safe version of the source prompt; adult-safe styling; real brands, logos, teams, and public-figure likenesses replaced with fictional/generic equivalents; no watermark, no random text, no real brand logo, no unauthorized celebrity likeness, no copied IP, no distorted anatomy, no clutter.
